title: NARA NW YOUTH PROGRAM - 211info
text: NARA NW CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES GRESHAM NARA NW YOUTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides life skills training, methamphetamine and suicide prevention courses, cultural groups and activities. Can also provide referrals to other agency services. 620 NE 2nd Street Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Ages 13-24 who identify as Native American Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 953-6598 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 953-6598 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties Services: Cultural Heritage Programs * Native American Community * Youth Issues Drug Use Disorder Education/Prevention * Native American Community * Youth Issues Life Skills Education * Native American Community * Youth Issues Mental Health Information/Education * Native American Community * Youth Issues Substance Use Disorder Referrals * Native American Community * Youth Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
